title: Chain and mobile snatching near CG Road
narrative: On 04/07/2026 at about 21:30 hours, the complainant was walking near CG Road, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad, when two unknown persons on a black motorcycle without a number plate approached from behind. The pillion rider threatened the complainant with an iron rod and forcibly snatched her gold chain weighing about 15 grams and her mobile phone (Samsung Galaxy, black). Both accused fled towards Stadium Circle. The complainant sustained a minor injury on her neck during the snatching.
narrative_en: On 04/07/2026 at about 21:30 hours, the complainant was walking near CG Road, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad, when two unknown persons on a black motorcycle without a number plate approached from behind. The pillion rider threatened the complainant with an iron rod and forcibly snatched her gold chain weighing about 15 grams and her mobile phone (Samsung Galaxy, black). Both accused fled towards Stadium Circle. The complainant sustained a minor injury on her neck during the snatching.

title: House burglary in Maninagar
narrative: दिनांक 02/07/2026 को शिकायतकर्ता अपने परिवार के साथ शादी समारोह में गया हुआ था। रात लगभग 11 बजे लौटने पर देखा कि मणिनगर स्थित उसके मकान का मुख्य दरवाज़े का ताला टूटा हुआ है और घर का सामान बिखरा पड़ा है। अलमारी से लगभग 25 तोला सोने के गहने और नकद 80,000 रुपये चोरी हो गए हैं। अज्ञात चोरों के खिलाफ कानूनी कार्रवाई की मांग की जाती है।
narrative_en: On 02/07/2026 the complainant had gone with his family to attend a wedding ceremony. On returning at about 11 PM, he found that the lock of the main door of his house in Maninagar was broken and household articles were scattered. Gold ornaments weighing about 25 tolas and cash of Rs. 80,000 were stolen from the cupboard. Legal action is requested against the unknown thieves.

title: Online UPI fraud via fake KYC call
narrative: તારીખ 01/07/2026 ના રોજ ફરિયાદીને એક અજાણ્યા નંબર પરથી ફોન આવ્યો હતો, જેમાં ફોન કરનારે પોતાને બેંક અધિકારી તરીકે ઓળખાવી KYC અપડેટ ન કરવાથી ખાતું બંધ થઈ જશે તેવી ધમકી આપી હતી. ફરિયાદીએ ડરના કારણે તેના મોબાઈલ પર આવેલો OTP જણાવી દીધો હતો. ત્યારબાદ ફરિયાદીના બેંક ખાતામાંથી UPI દ્વારા ત્રણ વ્યવહારોમાં કુલ 1,45,000 રૂપિયા ઉપાડી લેવામાં આવ્યા હતા. અજાણ્યા છેતરપિંડી કરનાર સામે કાયદેસર કાર્યવાહી કરવા વિનંતી છે.
narrative_en: On 01/07/2026 the complainant received a call from an unknown number in which the caller, identifying himself as a bank officer, threatened that the account would be blocked if KYC was not updated. Out of fear, the complainant shared the OTP received on his mobile. Thereafter, a total of Rs. 1,45,000 was withdrawn from the complainant's bank account through three UPI transactions. Legal action is requested against the unknown fraudster.
